headline: 暑期档新片来袭，福尔摩斯小姐3领跑
headlineEn: Summer Blockbusters Arrive, Enola Holmes 3 Leads
summary: 今日娱乐新闻：无新片上映，但本周《福尔摩斯小姐3》和《痴迷》热度高涨。未来《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》《奥德赛》等备受期待。
summaryEn: Today's entertainment news: No new releases today, but Enola Holmes 3 and Obsession top trending this week. Upcoming Spider-Man: Brand New Day and Odyssey highly anticipated.

industryHighlights.en: Spider-Man: Brand New Day scheduled for 2027

industryHighlights.text: 《海洋奇缘：启航》本周热度飙升
industryHighlights.en: Moana: Voyage gains traction this week
Avatar: The Last Airbender live-action series in development
